core.registry: window.YM_S['FILENAME'] = { name, icon, category, description, activate(ctx){}, deactivate(){}, renderPanel(container){} };

global_api.registry: window.YM_sphereRegistry  // Map<filename, ctx> of active spheres

constraints: activate() must complete in <8s — never await slow calls inline
deactivate() is a top-level method, never ctx.deactivate=...
window.YM_S key MUST exactly match the filename
broadcastData() payload must stay under 500 bytes
Do not clamp targetPage to pageCount at widget spawn — registerWidgetPage creates pages as needed
anti_patterns: Do not use localStorage directly in a sphere — use ctx.storage.get/set/del instead
Never declare top-level vars outside the IIFE
Never assign deactivate via ctx.deactivate = ... — it must be a top-level method on the YM_S object
